emails.subject: Happy Birthday
emails.body: Happy Birthday You are invited to your belated birthday lunch on me this Friday (or other day next week if it is better for you). RSVP by email! Cordially, Mary Cook Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith, 38th Floor, Legal Houston, Texas 77002-7361 (713) 345-7732 (phone) (713) 646-3490 (fax) mary.cook@enron.com
